chapter_title.ar: باب صَدَقَاتِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ فَاطِمَةَ وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ وَصَايَاهُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The charities of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, and Fatima<sup>asws</sup>, and the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, and their<sup>asws</sup> bequests

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/91)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/91)
text: أَعْتَقَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ غِلْمَانِهِ عِنْدَ مَوْتِهِ شِرَارَهُمْ وَ أَمْسَكَ خِيَارَهُمْ فَقُلْتُ يَا أَبَهْ تُعْتِقُ هَؤُلَاءِ وَ تُمْسِكُ هَؤُلَاءِ فَقَالَ إِنَّهُمْ قَدْ أَصَابُوا مِنِّي ضُرّاً فَيَكُونُ هَذَا بِهَذَا .

en.hubeali: From him, from Abdullah Bin Jabala and someone else, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> emancipated (liberated) the mischievous ones from his<sup>asws</sup> slaves, during his<sup>asws</sup> passing away, and retained the good ones of them’. So I<sup>asws</sup> said, ‘O father<sup>asws</sup>! You<sup>asws</sup> are freeing these ones and retaining those ones’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They had been subjected to disciplining from me<sup>asws</sup>, so that happened by this’.
en.sarwar: 13. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah and others from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that abu Ja‘far, at the time of his passing away freed the mischievous ones among his slaves and kept the good ones. I asked, ‘Father, do you free these and keep these?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘These were subjected to my disciplining, thus, this is for that.’”
